intelligence.verdict: Parents say Labschool is one of the most well-known national-plus schools in Indonesia - the UNJ affiliation gives it credibility.

fees.note: Approximate annual fee range: US$3.1K – US$5.2K. Contact the school for the full fee schedule and payment options.

paragraphs: Diverse international and local student body. Contact the school for current enrolment details.
Facilities include: Science laboratories, Libraries, Sports facilities, Auditorium, Computer labs.
